deploy.startCommand: bash -lc 'echo "=== DISK USAGE ===" && df -h "${DATA_DIR:-/data}" 2>&1 || true; echo "=== /data BREAKDOWN ===" && du -sh "${DATA_DIR:-/data}"/* 2>/dev/null | sort -h || true; echo "=== CLEANUP TEMPFILES ===" && find "${DATA_DIR:-/data}/deliveries" -name "*.part" -delete 2>/dev/null && find "${DATA_DIR:-/data}" -name "*.tmp" -delete 2>/dev/null && echo "cleanup ok" || true; echo "=== STARTING UVICORN ===" && exec uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port $PORT'
